name: Field Trip Health Ltd.
summary: Field Trip Health Ltd. engages in the development and delivery of psychedelic therapies. Its Research division is involved in the development of psychedelic molecules and conducting research on plant-based psychedelics. The company also operates Field Trip Health clinics for psychedelic therapies in North America. Its Technology division engages in building digital and technological tools to support psychedelic experiences and consciousness expansion. Field Trip Health Ltd. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
